free_text: Identification of key astrophysical resonances
relevant for the 26gAl(p,g)27Si reaction in Wolf-
Rayet stars, AGB stars, and classical novae
Experiment performed at Argonne ATLAS
accelerator
12C target with thickness of approx. 150 mu-g/cm2
Resulting gamma decays were detected with the
Gammasphere array
Compiled by S.H.
